## Summary

What this PR changes and why. Link related issues with "Closes #123".

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Testing

How you verified this works. Include manual test steps for UI changes.

- [ ] Golden path tested in browser
- [ ] At least one edge case tested
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] No raw Tailwind color scales (`slate-*`, `gray-*`, `emerald-*`, etc.) — design tokens only
- [ ] New `lib/` exports have JSDoc
- [ ] New shared component props have props comments
- [ ] No real student PII in fixtures, tests, or screenshots
- [ ] No new third-party analytics SDKs added without maintainer approval
- [ ] Schema changes include a Prisma migration (not just `db push`)

### Docs that must stay current

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` "Current state" updated if this PR changes project status
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` "Now" section updated if this PR closes the current sprint
- [ ] New ADR added to `docs/decisions/` if this PR settles an architectural choice

## Screenshots

For UI changes, before/after screenshots.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want a reviewer to pay extra attention to.
